name: WILH WILHELMSEN HOLDING-B
summary: Wilh. Wilhelmsen Holding ASA is a global maritime industry group that owns and invests in companies within the maritime, energy, and logistics sectors. The company has a diverse portfolio of businesses, including Wilhelmsen Maritime Services, Wallenius Wilhelmsen, and Hyundai Glovis. Wilh. Wilhelmsen Holding is headquartered in Lysaker, Norway.
